text:
Hello,
My name's Osi. I'm a analyst returning to statistical study after several years of broadly unrelated programming work.
I've used R since my Bachelors degree, and am now doing an honours thesis on the properties of random number generators. I was also at a R Dev day in Melbourne, Australia a few months ago, and enjoyed conducting bugfixes on the software that has contributed so much to my career. I'd like to make more connections in the R space and contribute to R Core (not least to get more experience on large collaborative projects).

text:
Hi everyone :wave:

I’m *epixJayant*, a 2nd-year B.Tech student (Mathematics & Computing) RGIPT. I’m currently exploring animint2 and working through the chapters step-by-step to understand interactive data visualization deeply. Since i love the video editing and graphic designing,

I’m especially interested in contributing to *Animated interactive ggplots using animint2* through GSoC, and I'm focusing on building strong fundamentals first (ggplot grammar, multi-layer, linked plots, etc.). I trust on process more than shortcuts.

Looking forward to *learning from you all* and contributing meaningfully that can make Data Visualization more meaningful and easy to understand :rocket:
